text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as Silence Suzuka is finishing up her
training...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for today. By the way, about
tomorrow's training session...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Look, it's Suzuka! Let's nab this cutie, eh,
Bourbon? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood, Falcon. Now commencing capture
procedure.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait a—Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, Silence Suzuka is swept
away by the two Umamusume. I rush frantically
after them...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
One, two, smile! Pose! One, two, pose! That's
it! ☆ All right, now, all together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
One, two, smile. Pose. One, two, pose. All
commands executed successfully.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... I've been invited to dance lessons. I'm not
very good at saying no...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause you and Bourbon are totes Umadol
material!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Materials are irrelevant. These lessons are
valuable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Falcon excels in emotional expression. There is
much to be learned by referencing her speech and
conduct.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's give it our all! We've got a fan
watching today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming. The presence of a third
party is important for improving our performance.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You're so right! Well then, let's start the music!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stick around a while and watch the three
practice.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Next, let's rehearse some call and response! I'll
give an example.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right, you over there! When I give you the
signal, you scream out, "FAAALCOOO!" Okay?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Now you're getting dragged into this too...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Are you're reeeadyyy?! Fa-fa-fa...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It needs a little more oomph, like
"FAAALCOOO!" ☆ Okaaay, let's do Bourbon
next!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Commencing operation.
Bour-Bour-Bour...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: BOURBON!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Perfection! ♪ Just what I expected from
Suzuka's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And now for the headliner! Aaah! I can't wait! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm... What do I do?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Easier said than done...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You never know if you don't try, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A good concert relies on the full effort of both
the Umadols and their fans!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Uh... I still don't... Maybe, something like—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: S-suzu-suzu-suzu...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You were perfectly synchronized with your fan.
This performance is a verified success.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Totally! You're really coming into your own as an
Umadol, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three Umadols are bursting with motivation. I
look forward to seeing where they go from here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... You can stop us at any point...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: B-but what if nothing feels right? Um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-I'm Silence Suzuka! ...Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... I just did what seemed right...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
WAY! Suzuka! That was amazing! Like, so cute! So
adorbs!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Intriguing. A display of shyness can prove quite
effective. I will remember this.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was right about you, Suzuka! You have
what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka is making big strides as
an Umadol! I think!
